payload.description:
EvaluationTask detail baseline and regression baseline rows should use the same standard related-resource layout as Procedure and Score Version rows.

Behavior spec:
Feature: EvaluationTask baseline related-resource layout
Scenario: Baseline evaluation links render consistently
Given an EvaluationTask is shown in detail mode with baseline and regression baseline evaluation IDs
When the baseline related-resource cards render
Then each baseline row shows the link icon inline next to the baseline identifier
And each row reserves the right metadata area for timestamp metadata when available
And the layout matches the standard RelatedResourceCard behavior used by Procedure and Score Version links.

Definition of Done:
- Baseline and regression baseline links use inline related-resource link placement.
- Baseline rows share the same RelatedResourceCard timing/link API where applicable.
- Focused EvaluationTask tests cover the layout.
payload.title: Standardize EvaluationTask baseline related links
